def __init__(self):
    self.instances = []
    ev1 = EvenementObj(1, "Conférence IA", "Présentation IA", 30, "contact@centre.fr")
    self.instances.append(ev1)

class EvenementObj:
    def __init__(self, idEvenement, nom, description, nbParticipants, emailReferent):
        self.idEvenement = idEvenement
        self.nom = nom
        self.description = description
        self.nbParticipants = nbParticipants
        self.emailReferent = emailReferent
        self.reservation = None
        self.element = None
